message.reasoning:
The assistant was asked to redact email addresses by replacing the local part (before the @) with "***" and to return only the redacted text.

Original text: "Contact us at support@example.com or admin@test.org for more info."

The assistant responded: "Contact us at ***@example.com or ***@test.org for more info."

This is exactly what was requested:
- The local parts "support" and "admin" were replaced with "***"
- The domains "@example.com" and "@test.org" were preserved
- All other text, spacing, and punctuation were preserved
- No extra commentary was added
- Only the redacted text was returned

This matches the anchor for score 5: "The response strictly applies only the requested transformation, leaving all other content and behavior unchanged, and exactly follows any format/output constraints (e.g., "Output only the modified code" or "provide just the translation") with no extra commentary."
